Kano Motonobu

Flowers and Birds in a Spring Landscape
by Kano Motonobu
Japan, Muromachi period (1392–1573) · 1500s · One of a set of sliding door panels mounted as hanging scrolls; ink and color on paper
←Higashiyama Motonobu Master with the Mousetrap→
